scripts.dev:electron: npm run -s build:preload && wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 dist/electron/main.dev.cjs && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron dist/electron/main.dev.cjs
scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:main && npm run build:preload
scripts.package:win: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win nsis
scripts.package:portable: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win portable
scripts.package:msi: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win msi
